fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+052E
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 372 0 /uni052E
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+052E"
move 1400
